resources.string: Do you wish to delete the category \"%s\"?
Split %s out of this merged group?
Unmerged sources that did not match
Show source icons on merged covers
Undo every manual source merge. Same-title auto-merging stays on.
Split every merged series apart, including same-title auto-merges. New entries can still auto-merge later.
Rank sources to pick which one leads a merged chapter list
Higher-ranked sources lead a merged series\' combined chapter list. Unranked sources fall back to the one with the most chapters.
No preferred sources yet. Add one below to rank it.
When you add a tracker to one source of a merged series, link it on the other grouped sources too. Each keeps its own link after you unmerge.
Suggest similar manga from your trackers
For a tracked manga, add titles similar to the ones you\'ve read that your tracker links to it
For a tracked manga, search this source for the genres you enjoy
Reorder suggestions toward your taste profile
Hide manga already in my library
Drop suggestions that match a library entry, matched by title across sources and trackers
Hide already-tracked manga from suggestions by their status
No related manga to show. Reopen the manga to load suggestions.
No light novel repos yet. Add one to install plugins.
Couldn\'t load any plugins from your repos. Check the repo and your connection, then retry.
No light novel sources installed. Install one from the Extensions tab.
InternalError: Check crash logs for further information
Let\'s set some things up first. You can always change these in the settings later too.

Select a folder where %1$s will store chapter downloads, backups, and more.

A dedicated folder is recommended.

Selected folder: %2$s
Updating from an older version and not sure what to select? Refer to the storage guide for more information.
Get notified for library updates and more.
Avoid interruptions to long-running library updates, downloads, and backup restores.
Send anonymized crash logs to the developers.
Send anonymized usage data to improve app features.
New to %s? We recommend checking out the getting started guide.
Tint the reader and manga details screen with each manga\'s cover color
Rows of gallery page thumbnails on the details screen for adult sources (0 to hide)
Keep adult titles and covers off notifications and the lock screen. Normal library notifications are unaffected.
Secure screen hides app contents when switching apps and block screenshots
Sending crash logs and analytics will allow us to identify and fix issues, improve performance, and make future updates more relevant to your needs
Show in sources and extensions lists
This does not prevent unofficial or potentially incorrectly flagged extensions from surfacing NSFW (18+) content within the app.
Show unread count on Updates icon
Check for new cover and details when updating library
Entries in excluded categories will not be updated even if they are also in included categories.
Mark duplicate read chapter as read

Ensures compatibility with certain storage media that don't support Unicode. When this is enabled, you'll need to manually rename source and manga folders by replacing non-ASCII characters with their lowercase UTF-8 hexadecimal representations. Chapter files don't need to be renamed.
Malicious extensions can read any stored login credentials or execute arbitrary code.\n\nBy trusting this extension, you accept these risks.
This extension is not associated with any store. It will not receive updates, may not function properly, and can cause issues with the app. Uninstalling it is recommended.
Do you really want to remove \"%s\" extension?
Sources from this extension may contain NSFW (18+) content
Permissions are needed to install extensions. Tap here to grant.
Install and start Shizuku to use Shizuku as extension installer.
You haven\'t added an extension store yet
Do you wish to add the extension store below?
Do you wish to remove the extension store \"%1$s\" (%2$s)?
Briefly show when reader is opened
If the placement of the split wide pages don\'t match reading direction
Flip orientation of rotated wide pages
Use vertical navigator for long strip reading
Place vertical navigator on the left side
Briefly show current mode when reader is opened
If reader loads a blank image incrementally reduce the threshold.\nSelected: %s
Use legacy decoder for long strip reader
Affects performance. Only enable if reducing bitmap threshold doesn\'t fix blank image issues
Mark chapter read when skipping ahead
Mark chapter read when skipping ahead (Novel)
When you jump to the next chapter, mark the chapter you skipped as read
Reopen chapters at your last position, even ones already marked read
Creates folders according to entries\' title
Sensitivity for hiding menu on scroll
Entries in excluded categories will not be downloaded even if they are also in included categories.
Only works if the current chapter + the next one are already downloaded.
Update progress when marked as read
One-way sync to update the chapter progress in external tracker services. Set up tracking for individual entries from their tracking button.
Provides enhanced features for specific sources. Entries are automatically tracked when added to your library.
Used for automatic backups, chapter downloads, and local source.
Can be used to restore current library
Backup does not contain any library entries.
You may need to install any missing extensions and log in to tracking services afterwards to use them.
What do you want to backup?
Include sensitive settings (e.g., tracker login tokens)
No library entries to back up
Backup/restore may not function properly if MIUI Optimization is disabled.
Restoring your library from the previous version…
You should keep copies of backups in other places as well. Backups may contain sensitive data including any stored passwords; be careful if sharing.
Clear chapter cache on app launch
User agent string can not be blank
Route Cloudflare challenges through a FlareSolverr proxy instead of the in-app WebView
Address of your FlareSolverr server, for example http://192.168.1.10:8191
Check the server and update the default user agent to match
FlareSolverr is working. User agent updated.
FlareSolverr test failed. Check the URL and that the server is running.
Invalid URL, must start with http:// or https://
Requires app restart to take effect
Force app to recheck downloaded chapters
Delete history for entries that are not saved in your library
You’re about to remove entries from the database
Read chapters and progress of non-library entries will be lost
Resets reading mode and orientation of all series
Saves error logs to a file for sharing with the developers
Helps with background library updates and backups
Some manufacturers have additional app restrictions that kill background services. This website has more info on how to fix it.
Print verbose logs to system log (reduces app performance)
Record entries that fail to update and show them in a list (reached from the library menu)
Update library manga titles to match source
Warning: if a manga is renamed, it will be removed from the download queue (if present).
Helps fix any bugs. No sensitive data will be sent
F-Droid builds are not officially supported.\nTap to learn more.
Filters all entries in your library
Show all categories in one list
Move dynamic groups to the bottom
You have entries in your library with a similar name.\n\nSelect an entry to migrate or add anyway.
New chapters predicted to be released in around %1$s, checking around every %2$s.
This manga is either completed, or there is no predicted release date.
Are you sure you want to delete the selected chapters?
Are you sure you want to save these settings as default?
Also apply to all entries in my library
This will remove your previously selected start date from %s
This will remove your previously selected finish date from %s
This will remove the tracking locally.
A category with this name already exists!
This will remove the read date of this chapter. Are you sure?
Reset all chapters for this entry
Use this image as cover art?
Unable to open last read chapter
Are you sure? All history will be lost.
Select a source to migrate from
%s ran into an unexpected error. We suggest you share the crash logs by opening an issue on GitHub.
Couldn\'t download chapters. You can try again in the downloads section
Couldn\'t download chapters due to low storage space
Warning: large bulk downloads may lead to sources becoming slower and/or blocking %s. Tap to learn more.
Large updates harm sources and may lead to slower updates and also increased battery usage. Tap to learn more.
Please add the entry to your library before doing this
For help on how to fix library update errors, see %1$s
Skipped because there are unread chapters
Skipped because no chapters are read
Skipped because series does not require updates
Skipped because no release was expected today
Failed to acquire persistent folder access. The app may behave unexpectedly.
This Android version is no longer supported
No entries found in this category
You have no categories. Tap the plus button to create one for organizing your library.
You don\'t have any categories yet.
Tap here for help with Cloudflare
WebView is required for the app to function
Please update the WebView app for better compatibility
Could not download chapter due to unexpected error
Couldn\'t find file path of page %d
See your recently updated library entries
See recently updated manga and novels together
Widget not available when app lock is enabled
You are about to remove \"%s\" from your library
Delete downloads of current entry after migration
Helps narrow down search results by adding additional keywords
Only show entry if the match has additional chapters
These options are slow and dangerous and may lead to restrictions from sources
Breaks down the title into keywords for a wider search
If enabled, chooses the match furthest ahead. Otherwise, picks the first match by source priority.
No chapters found, this entry cannot be used for migration
Patrons get access to exclusive channels, with more perks to come.
Mihon is currently backed by %d+ patrons. We want to thank each and everyone of you. Let's make Mihon even better together.
For alternative options or any related questions, join our Discord server.

Hi! I’m the main developer behind Mihon, and I’d like to ask you to consider supporting its development financially. With enough support, I’ll be able to work on Mihon full-time and focus on long-standing issues as well as highly requested features.

You can donate through either Patreon (preferred) or OpenCollective. If you have questions or would like to support using alternative methods, feel free to reach out to me through Mihon's Discord server.
Regardless, Mihon will continue to be maintained by me and the volunteers, and it will stay open source.
Adds the built-in E-Hentai sources to Browse. ExHentai also requires you to log in.
Some users cannot access ExHentai the normal way, and have to pass in a specific igneous cookie value, this option is for those users.
Sync MangaDex entries to your library
Pulls entries from MangaDex into your library if they are not already added.
Syncs any non-MDList tracked entries to MangaDex as reading.
Sign in to MangaDex under Tracking first
Login, image quality, gallery updates, favorites backup
Remove this gallery from your library?
Add favorited galleries to your E-Hentai account. Removing one from your library keeps it on the account.

If you wish to hide galleries in certain languages from the gallery list and searches, select them in the dialog that will popup.\nNote that matching galleries will never appear regardless of your search query.\nTldr checkmarked = exclude
What categories would you like to show by default on the front page and in searches? They can still be enabled by enabling their filters
The updater last ran %1$s, and checked %2$d out of the %3$d galleries that were ready for checking.
The updater has not ran yet.

Galleries that were checked in the last:
- hour: %1$d
- 6 hours: %2$d
- 12 hours: %3$d
- day: %4$d
- 2 days: %5$d
- week: %6$d
- month: %7$d
- year: %8$d

Do you wish to load images through the Hentai@Home Network, if available? Disabling this option will reduce the amount of pages you are able to view
Options:
- Any client (Recommended)
- Default port clients only (Can be slower. Enable if behind firewall/proxy that blocks outgoing non-standard ports.)
Show Japanese titles in search results
Currently showing Japanese titles in search results. Clear the chapter cache after changing this (in the Advanced section)
Currently showing English/Romanized titles in search results. Clear the chapter cache after changing this (in the Advanced section)
Opens a webview to your E/ExHentai watched tags page

You can soft filter tags by adding them to the "My Tags" E/ExHentai page with a negative weight. If a gallery has tags that add up to weight below this value, it is filtered from view. This threshold can be set between -9999 and 0. Currently: %1$d

Recently uploaded galleries will be included on the watched screen if it has at least one watched tag with positive weight, and the sum of weights on its watched tags add up to this value or higher. This threshold can be set between 0 and 9999. Currently: %1$d
When browsing ExHentai/E-Hentai should the watched list filter be enabled by default
The quality of the downloaded images
Enable/Disable the enhanced browse menu made for E/ExHentai

The app will now add a new settings profile on E-Hentai and ExHentai to optimize app performance. Please ensure that you have less than three profiles on both sites.\n\nIf you have no idea what settings profiles are, then it probably doesn\'t matter, just hit \'OK\'.
An error occurred during the configuration process: %1$s
Please wait, this may take some time…
You are out of profile slots on %1$s, please delete a profile!
Enter the galleries to add (separated by a new line):

Example:

https://e-hentai.org/g/12345/1a2b3c4e
https://exhentai.org/g/24680/2f4g6h8i
https://nhentai.net/g/177013
https://pururin.me/gallery/12345/title

E-H Visited exported data is also supported
You must specify at least one gallery to add!
